localizations.title: Restart
localizations.hint_0_first: The crealys is the symbolic flower of Crearia.
localizations.hint_0: Where have you seen a crealys flower since you started your adventure? It is part of Crearia's logo. Once you have found it, bring it to the sorcerer (15).
localizations.hint_4: In many games, the "!" icon above a character indicates that character has a quest for you.
localizations.hint_5: You must manage to corner and catch Wolfix. Use the mushrooms to gain speed. Don't just try to follow Wolfix's route; instead, try to anticipate his moves to cut him off.
localizations.hint_6: To continue your journey to the castle, you will need to find a way to get rid of the wolf. If you haven't done so yet, first complete the quest given to you by the sorcerer (15).
localizations.hint_11: Avoid landing on a surface that will make you lose more life points.
localizations.hint_15: "Spin around and around" indicates which card you should take next.
localizations.hint_17: At first glance, the staff is not very impressive, but it may be useful against a weak enemy.
localizations.hint_23_first: The staff did not produce the anticipated result. The wolf is intently looking at it, and seems to be in a playful mood.
localizations.hint_23: If you get rid of the staff, the wolf will chase it. But where can you throw it?
localizations.hint_28: Once you find something that the king can offer to the queen to regain her heart, this royal seal will allow you to certify the gift's origin.
localizations.hint_30: The dial will not be of any use until the game requests a copy protection code.
localizations.hint_33_first: A specific sequence is required to open the door that provides access to the portal.
localizations.hint_33: You must have written the sequence down somewhere, a long time ago.
localizations.hint_34: To whom should the king give the Wedding Ring?
localizations.hint_36_first: The sorcerer asks you to take the Unlock! Rules Manual. Regarding which two ingredients, you'll find those on the copy protection dial (30).
localizations.hint_36: Rotate the copy protection dial (30) so that the eye and the mushroom are aligned. The dial will then indiate a page in the rulebook, as well as two colors.
localizations.hint_37_first: To open this door, you must press the X button.
localizations.hint_37: Where is your game controller? Find it and press the X button.
localizations.hint_42_first: You can use the teleportation portal to go wherever you want. Which destination would you like to travel to?
localizations.hint_42: Your device's camera has been activated. Point it at the chosen destination.
localizations.hint_45: The poster has been autographed and addressed to you! You've always been a fan of female warriors!
localizations.hint_46_first: Things ended up poorly the last time you tried using force against him. Carefully examine the troll and see if you can find some trick to get rid of him.
localizations.hint_46: Take notice of the damaged shield the troll is carrying on his back.
localizations.hint_48_first: You must find a way to reconcile the king and the queen. What gift could the king offer to his queen?
localizations.hint_48: What if the king offered the Wedding Ring (52) to the dryad (12)?  How can you deliver the king's gift?
localizations.hint_60: What are you bringing to the dryad?
localizations.hint_65: You must find a way to seal the envelope.
localizations.hint_70_first: The river is clean upstream, while it is polluted downstream. What is happening in between?
localizations.hint_70: Look for the source of the pollution somewhere between the clean part of the river (70) and the polluted river (72).
localizations.hint_71: This factory is responsible for polluting the river. It must be destroyed. Go for it!
localizations.hint_81_first: Which of the two parents will be in front of the attic door after going upstairs?
localizations.hint_81: The mother is going upstairs. Once there, the paintings and her shirt will indicate which card to take next.
localizations.hint_82_first: The teleportation portal is marked by the arrow. There is only one way to get there; the order and shape of the path you take is essential.
localizations.hint_82: The path to the portal starts with the ladder on the lower-right. By climbing the ladder to the first platform, heading to the left, and then climbing the vine to the small tunnel, you form the number "4". The passage leads you to the exit on the upper-left...
localizations.hint_83: Closely examine the shape formed by the splashing water.
localizations.hint_84: The troll looks very strong, and you must defeat him to get to the castle.
localizations.hint_85_first: The only thing left to do is stamp the king's seal into the wax.
localizations.hint_85: Physically stamp the seal on the king's ring into the wax seal.
localizations.hint_87: The hit from the troll's club causes you to lose 89 life points. How many points do you have left?
localizations.hint_90: To play a game, you must first insert a CD-ROM.
localizations.hint_90_step2: Interested in a game of Crearia? If so, insert the CD-ROM into the drive.
localizations.hint_90_step5: An old souvenir in the attic might remind you of the character class you liked to play back then.
localizations.hint_90_step6: Why not use the same username as you used back then? It must be written down somewhere. Look through your old stuff.
localizations.hint_90_step7: It seems to be stuck at 99%... There is a card that will allow you to get it to finish loading.
localizations.hint_93: Wolfix is now in a vulnerable position. Take notice of the jetpack he's wearing on his back. One hit in the right place should end his plans!
localizations.hint_94: The game has crashed. Maybe there's a problem with the CD-ROM.
localizations.hint_94_step2: The disc must be dusty, preventing it from being read properly. How can you remove it?
localizations.hint_94_step3: Also take notice of the fingerprint on the CD-ROM. You must clean it.
localizations.hint_95_first: Wolfix is a far higher level than you are. A frontal assault may be fatal to you. Your feeling of deja-vu might be because Wolfix is a wolf...
localizations.hint_95: Perhaps Wolfix is the wolf you encountered earlier in this adventure. How did you get rid of him the first time?
localizations.hint_96: It's your son's hand. He's trying to bring you back to reality. You must have been too absorbed in the game! Turn your attention to the hand to determine which card to take next.
localizations.hint_100: Your character is ready. Just press the START button to launch the game!
localizations.answer_hint_0: Look closely at the Crearia CD-ROM (68). There is a crealys on each side of the title. These match the flowers found on the lower left side (+20) of card 0. Bring them to the sorcerer (15).
localizations.answer_hint_4: Look carefully at the your deck of cards. One of them has the "!" icon.
localizations.answer_hint_11: Guide your fall (11) into the Crearia River (72) to avoid suffering additional damage.
localizations.answer_hint_15: By spinning around and around for eternity, you will form a circle. One of the cards has a circle instead of a number.
localizations.answer_hint_17: Have you tried using the staff (17) to defeat the wolf? (6)
localizations.answer_hint_23: Throw the staff (17) into the vast Crearia wilds (4).
localizations.answer_hint_33: The code on the sticky note (2) is the sequence needed to open the door (33). Knock on the door by tapping your screen as follows (pausing in between each part): once, three times, once.
localizations.answer_hint_34: Go and deliver the king's gift (34) to the dryad (12) to try to reconcile them.
localizations.answer_hint_36: Once you have the eye and the mushroom aligned, the copy protection dial (30) indicates Page 4, and shows the yellow and pink colors. Go to page 4 of the Unlock! rulebook; you can see colored clouds coming from the cauldron. Inside the yellow cloud is a 4, while inside the pink cloud is an 8.
localizations.answer_hint_37: Find the controller on the lower side of the app screen and press the X button to open the doors to the castle.
localizations.answer_hint_42: The sorcerer (35) told you to go to the Royal Castle. Hold your device's camera above the Royal Castle (10) to teleport yourself there.
localizations.answer_hint_46: Perhaps the troll (46) would be interested in a new shield? Give him the flyer featuring the promotional ad (14).
localizations.answer_hint_48: Start by placing the Wedding Ring (52) into the empty envelope (13).
localizations.answer_hint_60: Give the dryad (60) the Wedding Ring as a gift on behalf of the king (34).
localizations.answer_hint_65: Pour some hot wax (20) onto the envelope (65) to seal it shut.
localizations.answer_hint_70: You will find the source of the pollution on the card between the upstream section of the river (70) and the polluted downstream section (72).
localizations.answer_hint_71: Use your sword (3) to demolish the factory polluting the river (71).
localizations.answer_hint_81: Once the mother (8) is at the top of the stairs, the paintings and her shirt form the equation 50 + 8.
localizations.answer_hint_82: The rest of the path leading to the teleportation portal forms the number "2", so the full path forms a 4, then a 2.
localizations.answer_hint_83: The splash forms a 7 and a 0. (70)
localizations.answer_hint_84: Attack the troll with your sword (3).
localizations.answer_hint_85: Place card 85 (the wax-sealed envelope) horizontally faceup. Then place card 28 (the king's ring) vertically facedown on top of it, so that the two cards form a cross pattern. Where the two cards meet, you can see two numbers: a 3 (to the left of the computer) and a 4 (to the right of the computer).
localizations.answer_hint_87: You started the game with 100 life points (100). After suffering 89 points of damage, you are left with 11 life points (100 - 89).
localizations.answer_hint_90: Press the button for the CD-ROM drive at the bottom-right of the computer.
localizations.answer_hint_90_step2: Hold your device's camera over the Crearia CD-ROM (68).
localizations.answer_hint_90_step5: Your old Shield Maiden poster (45) attests to your admiration for female warriors. Choose the "WARRIOR" class.
localizations.answer_hint_90_step6: Carefully examine the Shield Maiden poster (45). It is addressed to "Molimiss," probably your old username. Enter MOLIMISS.
localizations.answer_hint_90_step7: If you want the loading screen to reach 100%, you will need to set it to 100 yourself.
localizations.answer_hint_93: It's time to deliver the fatal blow. Use your sword (3) to blow up Wolfix's jetpack (93).
localizations.answer_hint_94: Press the CD-ROM drive's button again on the bottom-right of the computer to eject the disc.
localizations.answer_hint_94_step2: Blow on the CD (near your device's microphone) to remove the dust.
localizations.answer_hint_94_step3: Clean the fingerprint by rubbing your device's screen on that spot.
localizations.answer_hint_95: Throw the metal bar (61) across the plains (+32) to distract Wolfix.
localizations.answer_hint_96: Your son is waving his 5 fingers in front of the computer screen to get your attention.
localizations.answer_hint_100: Take a closer look at the START button: The "A" is actually a "4"
localizations.machine_5: Bravo! You have freed the world of Crearia from the clutches of Wolfix. You've trapped him where he can't cause any more harm, at least for the time being… You hear a voice calling: "Is everything OK up there? It's time to eat!"
localizations.machine_33: That was the correct sequence! The door opens, giving you access to the inside of the gigantic tree that served as your base.
localizations.machine_42: You walk through the portal, which instantly teleports you to the gates of the Royal Castle.
localizations.machine_94: After cleaning the disc, you reinsert it into the CD-ROM drive. The game resumes…
localizations.button_X: The castle's gates open. You are about to enter when the game suddenly shuts down…
localizations.machine_30_warning_msg: "This dial was used to counter software piracy, but I no longer need it."
localizations.machine_5_intro_2:
PHEW!
THAT WAS A CLOSE ONE…
localizations.machine_90_enter_name:
WHAT IS THE NAME OF
YOUR CHARACTER
